title: Cities that look like Tokyo 3
wikitext:
[]: Cities that look like Tokyo-3             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 2:15 pm What cities look like Tokyo-3? Please provide pics and reasons for why you think so. Otakon 08 Ikari brought up the question in this thread: [url]http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=5438&highlight=[/url] ps - look up a picture of Pittsburgh PA and tell me it does not look like Tokyo 3.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Aug 12, 2008 8:18 pm keep in mind that Tokyo-3 is actually the town Hakone IRL that's been highly industrialized http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Neon_Genesis_Evangelion_glossary#Tokyo-3 http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hakone,_Kanagawa http://www.kanagawa-kankou.or.jp/english/area/hakone.html in terms of places that look like Tokyo-3, look at any of the "Four Asian Tigers"

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 11:07 pm Good finds HEB9000!

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Aug 12, 2008 11:35 pm I was especially amused by this one: Moto-Hakone Stone Buddhas Moto-Hakone Stone Buddhas At the foot of Mt.Futago, several stone Buddhas are carved in relief-form on the natural rock formations. access 10min. by bus to Futago-jaya bus stop from Moto-Hakone.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 11:39 pm I wouldn't be all to surprise either. It did indeed show the famous suicide spot that actually exists, so those spots probably do too.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Aug 12, 2008 11:45 pm Action_Bastard wrote: Good finds HEB9000!

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Aug 13, 2008 8:54 am I really think Pittsburgh looks like NT3. I enjoy just walking around during the evening and watching the red lights at the top of the buildings turn on and flash. Morning is very nice to cause the sun comes up over the city just like the second episode I believe it is. I guess you have to live here to see what I mean. Maybe I can go take some pictures tomorrow..Not today..partied all night -_-

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Aug 15, 2008 10:54 pm Off topic, a little, but here is a pic of the building in Dubai as of Aug. 8, 2008: http://www.burjdubaiskyscraper.com/2008/08August/burj_dubai_1009.jpg Sorry it is soo big, that is digg for ya. if it's so big, don't use img tags

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Fri Aug 15, 2008 10:59 pm Sorry it is soo big, that is digg for ya.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Aug 15, 2008 11:04 pm Sorry, I will remember that next time. But yeah, I thought that it looked like Tokyo-3 as well, but it is obviously too dry, with it being in Saudi Arabia.

[]:             Quote Post by Captain Mister » Fri Aug 15, 2008 11:25 pm God, Dubai. Such a disgusting place. I've seen that building, it looks pretty bad; it just dwarfs everything around it so it sticks out like a sore thumb. Tokyo 3 looks a lot like Singapore, IMO. Not so much like Pittsburgh, the buildings are kind of small. Houston and Frankfurt remind me of T3 as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Aug 15, 2008 11:30 pm Yes, Frankfurt fo-sho. Lang Phasendeutschland!

[]:             Quote Post by Crazy Packers Fan » Wed Aug 20, 2008 6:02 am I never thought Pittsburgh looked like Tokyo-3 before I read this, but now I can sort of see some similarities, especially with the tallest building, the U.S. Steel building (or whatever it's called now). Unfortunately this means I'm going to feel creeped out anytime I go downtown again, with fear of an Angel suddenly appearing overhead or the buildings suddenly shrinking into the ground.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Aug 20, 2008 7:25 am You live in Pittsburgh my friend, we need to meet up. You really have to see Pitt from a few miles away right as dawn hits or at night when the red lights come on. The hills around are a very nice touch Edit - You are a packers fan....?.....Ill let it slide.

[]:             Quote Post by p06 » Thu Aug 21, 2008 8:34 am Captain Mister wrote: Tokyo 3 looks a lot like Singapore, IMO.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Aug 21, 2008 10:05 am Sometime soon I'm going to be walking around taking pictures to show off different parts I think look like T3.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Thu Aug 21, 2008 11:12 am Here's a cityscape in EoE that I imagine we're supposed see as a' real-life' counterpart to Tokyo 3: That whole 'live action' sequence is full of 'real' visual references to stuff that shows up in NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Aug 21, 2008 11:22 am Hmmmm, interesting. Good work.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Aug 21, 2008 12:12 pm Very cool..I like that screen capture a lot but at the bottom of it I thought it said wet dreams ^-_-^;;
summary:
[]: Cities that look like Tokyo-3             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 12, 2008 2:15 pm What cities look like Tokyo-3? Please provide pics and reasons for why you think so. Otakon 08 Ikari brought up the question in this thread: [url]http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=5438&highlight=[/url] ps - look up a picture of Pittsburgh PA and tell me it does not look like Tokyo 3.

[]:        &nb
